posts.content: Our latest product update brings improved performance and new features! What do you think?

comments.body: This is a scam! Don't trust this company!
I love the new features! When will the mobile app be updated?
fake news! This product is garbage
Free money! Click here for spam offers!
Is this a scam? I'm genuinely asking because I heard mixed reviews.
This looks like fake news quality to me. Where are the sources?
I hate spam, but this post is actually legit. Good work team.
Great update! When will the API documentation be released?
Can you share more details about the performance improvements?
Love the new features! The UI feels much smoother now.
Not sure I understand the pricing change. Could you clarify?
The analytics dashboard is a game changer. Well done team!
Is there a roadmap for mobile app improvements? Looking forward to it.
This is disappointing. I expected better quality from this company.
This product feels overpriced compared to alternatives on the market.
Great update! Looking forward to the next feature release.
This is NOT a scam — I've been using it for weeks and it works great.
How is this fake news? The announcement seems well-sourced to me.
I don't see any spam here. This looks like a genuine product update.
The new dashboard is exactly what we needed. Thanks for listening to feedback!
Any plans to add dark mode? That would be a huge quality-of-life improvement.
I saw some scam reports about similar products. Is Mosi different?
Fake news or not, the pricing seems competitive compared to alternatives.
This thread is spam-free so far. Moderation seems to be working.
Can someone explain the difference between v1 and v2? The changelog is vague.
Love the direction. Hope you keep the spam filters strong.
When will the SSO integration be available? Our team is waiting.
This looks like a scam at first glance but I trust the Mosi brand.
Not fake news — I verified the claims with the official docs.
Please don't let this thread turn into spam. Keep it on topic.
Great update overall. One question: will there be a webinar to walk through v2?
I heard this was a scam from a friend, but trying it myself changed my mind.
The fake news claims don't hold up. I've tested every feature.
This is not spam. This is a legitimate product announcement.
Can you add export functionality? That's the only thing missing for us.
Overall impressed. Just fix the onboarding flow and it's perfect.
Scam accusations are unfounded. I've done the due diligence.
How do I upgrade from v1? The migration guide isn't clear.
This is fake news territory? No way. Solid release.
Please stop calling everything spam. This is a real update.
Will there be team pricing? We'd love to roll this out company-wide.
